# Mathematical Models Synthesis

The autonomous marketing system needs multiple mathematical models because marketing has different decision types.

## Operational decisions

Use Bayesian rate models and bandits.

## Causal decisions

Use A/B tests, lift tests, geo tests, difference-in-differences, CausalImpact, or MMM.

## Economic decisions

Use LTV/CAC, payback, contribution margin, and marginal response.

## Strategic budget decisions

Use MMM, response curves, saturation models, and calibrated experiments.

## Agent rule

The first question is not "which formula is impressive?"

The first question is:

```text
What decision is being made?
```
